title: Weekly Insights Review
summary:
Read here everything you need to know
Uncertainty Looms for VLCCs as Activity Slows Down - Another rally in spot VLCC rates ended up being just a short-term spike, as spot rates are back to mid-August lows after hitting multi-month highs . Read More
Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2024-08-27 142358.png | assets/2024-08-30_weekly-insights-review_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_2c72b3557d23.png
Image reference: unsplash-image-EBEsfbW8q4I.jpg | assets/2024-08-30_weekly-insights-review_img_unsplash-image-ebesfbw8q4i_8e14766beb18.jpg
Doric Weekly Market Insight
China's Baowu Steel Group, the world's largest steel producer, cautioned that the current downturn in China's steel industry would likely be longer and more severe than previously anticipated. Read More
Image reference: unsplash-image-35mllLKPDNY.jpg | assets/2024-08-30_weekly-insights-review_img_unsplash-image-35mlllkpdny_386666ba8e2e.jpg
From Commodore's Weekly Dry Bulk Reports
